name_en: Size change chip, custom top-grain cowhide
name_cn:

Top-tier original M47142 New Blue M46613 Caramel M44881 Apricot M41487 Black
POCHETTE MÉTIS Handbag
The Pochette Métis handbag interprets the classic academic backpack with a restrained yet ingenious design. Soft Monogram Empreinte leather shapes a compact, flexible structure, concealing ample space within.
Detailed Features
25 x 19 x 7 cm
(Length x Height x Width)
Monogram Empreinte embossed soft-grain cowhide / Soft-grain cowhide
Soft-grain cowhide trim
Fabric lining
Strap: Removable, adjustable
Half-length: 48.0 cm
Adjustable to: 55.0 cm
Handle: Single handle
